title: Bridge Essay: Transformation of Our Understanding of Breathing Control by Molecular Tools.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Breath/Soul** (Phase 2) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Breath/Soul to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Transformation of Our Understanding of Breathing Control by Molecular Tools.** — Annu Rev Physiol. PMID: 36323001. DOI: 10.1146/annurev-physiol-021522-094142. The rhythmicity of breath is vital for normal physiology. Even so, breathing is enriched with multifunctionality. External signals constantly change breathing, stopping it when under water or deepening it during exertion. Internal cues utilize breath to express emotions such as sighs of frustration and yawns of boredom.
